user.title: OpenClaw Agent (native)
user.description: Native integration via /v1/responses with stable session_key + persistent chain. Avoids the routing/session bugs of the OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

data.session_key: Stable session key (used as `user` field; pin it once and forget)
data.include_instructions: Send default system instructions on first turn

error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach the gateway. Check the URL and that the network is OK.
error.invalid_auth: Token rejected by the gateway (401/403). Regenerate it in OpenClaw and try again.
error.responses_disabled: The gateway returned 404 or HTML for /v1/responses. Enable it in openclaw.json: gateway.http.endpoints.responses.enabled = true, restart OpenClaw, and retry.

abort.already_configured: This gateway + session key combo is already configured.

data.include_instructions: Send default system instructions on first turn
data.extra_instructions: Extra instructions appended to the default (optional)
